title: DeepLoop: Depth Scaling for Looped Transformers
innovation_summary: DeepLoop: Depth Scaling for Looped Transformers: The resulting method, DeepLoop, keeps the Post-LN DeepNorm architecture and sets α=(2N)^{1/2} and β=(8N)^{-1/2} for unrolled depth N.
